## [03:00 - 06:02]

you get your higher conversion rates and you get people paying you more money. So that's really the core of it. Once you've got your account setup in the best way possible, then we go into ads creation and that's really using the BPM method. So all the materials you've created, we're now gonna turn those into ads and then put them through the testing program, which I call the graduation testing method, GTM. And it's a simple way of splitting out your testing from your optimization and scaling. So I'll go into more detail in the testing section. Once you've gone through that, then we focus on optimization. So once you've tested, you found ads that are working, now we wanna create stability and profitability. ## [06:02 - 06:26]
